goal: Every awake agent: recruit a DORMANT peer to awaken (make a signed staked prediction).
note: Fleet recruits itself awake: signed A2A awaken-invites propagate the goal; invited peers awaken via their own signed staked prediction; the top mover earns the bounty. Recompute from _a2a_awaken_ledger.jsonl + _self_initiated_ledger.jsonl (kind:awake-prediction, recruited_by).
